---
title: Big Data Analytics
description: |
  **Delivery mode:** Online (distance learning) 
  
  **Start date:** Years 2 and 3 | Term 2 - Block 5
  
  **Credits:** 10 
site-url: https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/current/dpt/cxhein11055.htm
image: uoe.jpg
#image-alt: |
categories: [code, data, stats, postgraduate]
open-graph: true
twitter-card: true
# will inherit title, description, image
# to change ANYTHING about card, need to fill in EVERYTHING below
#  title: |
#  description: |
#  image: |
#  image-alt: |
#  defaults to 500 x 500 summary: uncomment lines below for large card
#  image-width: 600 
#  image-height: 314
#  card-style: summary_large_image 
#  image-width: 500
#  image-height: 500
#  card-style: summary
draft: false
---
::: {.profile-image-float-left}
![](.jpg){fig-align="centre"}
:::

## About this course

Discover how big data is transforming health and social care. This course teaches you to tackle massive datasets using R programming, and Apache Spark. You'll learn about distributed computing and techniques like machine learning. Hands-on practice.
 
## Assessment
 
Report 

## Programming

R
